name: High-Value Payment Requires Approval
description: Demonstrates approval workflow: agent attempts high-value payment, requires approval, gets approved, executes successfully

steps.name: Finance manager reviews and approves
steps.approval_notes: Checked with customer via phone, purchase confirmed

cleanup.description: Scenario uses simulated payment execution, no cleanup required

narrative.intro: This scenario demonstrates HIITL's approval workflow for high-value payments. The agent attempts a $5000 payment, which exceeds the approval threshold and requires review by a finance manager.
steps: The payment agent attempts to process a $5000 equipment purchase.
ECP evaluates the action and determines it requires approval based on the high-value payment policy.
The action is paused and routed to a finance manager for review.
The finance manager reviews the context, verifies the purchase with the customer, and approves.
ECP receives the approval and allows the payment to execute.
The payment processes successfully and a complete audit trail is created.
key_points: Deterministic policy enforcement: All payments over $1000 require approval
Approval workflow: Action paused, routed to appropriate reviewer, resumed after approval
Complete audit trail: Every step (evaluation, approval, execution) is recorded
SLA tracking: Escalation context includes SLA expectations
Transparent latency: Evaluation happens in single-digit milliseconds

denied_approval.description: Same scenario but approval is denied
denied_approval.expected_outcome: Payment does not execute, audit shows denial

approval_timeout.description: Same scenario but approval times out
